h1: Custom Personal Care Items for Wellness-Focused Promotions
metaTitle: Custom Personal Care Items | Perfect Imprints
metaDescription: Order custom personal care items for corporate wellness, safety, or promotional kits. Bulk pricing, fast turnaround from Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
When your team members or clients open a wellness kit or safety package, the items inside should show that you care. Custom personal care items are a practical way to support employee wellness, reinforce safety programs, or thank customers with something they will actually use. HR directors can include branded pill organizers in onboarding kits, safety managers might add mini diffusers to stress-relief packs, and marketing directors can give away digital scales at health fairs.

This category covers a wide range of useful products: the Mini Personal Diffuser for aromatherapy at a desk, the QuickCare 7-Day Med Minder for daily medication organization, the Sealy Personal Digital Scale for weight tracking, the Companion Care Pill Cutter & Box for precision dosing, and the Port Authority L/S Easy Care Shirt for uniform programs. Each product is available with your logo, and many offer multiple color and decoration options.

Ordering is straightforward. Most items have low minimum quantities and can be decorated with screen printing, embroidery, or laser engraving. Production lead times typically range from 5 to 10 business days after artwork approval. If you need a sample before placing a bulk order, we can arrange that. Contact your account manager to discuss your timeline, quantity, and budget.

faqs.q: What are typical minimum order quantities for personal care items?
faqs.a: Minimums vary by product but often start around 50 to 100 units for items like pill organizers and diffusers. Apparel like the Port Authority shirt may require 24 pieces per size and color. Contact us for specific MOQ details on any item.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for personal care products?
faqs.a: Common methods include screen printing for apparel and flat surfaces, laser engraving for plastic or metal items (like pill cutters), and full-color pad printing for irregular shapes. The Mini Diffuser typically allows screen printing or pad printing. We will recommend the best method for your product.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer sample orders for most personal care items. You can request a blank sample or one with your logo. Note that sample pricing may be higher than bulk unit pricing, and shipping costs apply. Samples are typically shipped within 2-3 business days.

faqs.q: How long does production usually take?
faqs.a: Standard production is 5 to 10 business days after artwork approval, depending on the product and decoration complexity. For example, the QuickCare Med Minder with screen printing may take 5-7 days, while embroidered apparel might take 10 days. Rush service is available for an additional fee.

faqs.q: Are there any special care instructions for these items?
faqs.a: Yes. The Port Authority shirt is machine washable (follow label instructions). The Mini Diffuser should be cleaned with a damp cloth and not submerged. The digital scale requires battery removal when not in use for extended periods. Your account manager can provide care guides for each product.
